name: Pecan Cookies- Dkp
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Cream together the butter and brown sugar in a large mixing bowl until well blended.
3. Beat in the egg and vanilla until mixed.
4. Using a wooden spoon, stir in the flour, baking powder, and baking soda until combined.
5. Stir in the pecans.
6. Drop the mixture by spoonfuls onto lightly greased baking sheets.
7. Bake for 10 minutes or until golden brown and firm on top.
8. Cool on a wire rack.
